mentions.note: iPhone blowout, China staggeringly good, gross margins strong; avoided billions in capex via Google Gemini partnership—own, don't trade.
Second largest gold miner; stock shiny gold substitute as Bitcoin fails; bite bullet and get some, wait for pullback.
AWS strong but $200B capex shock overshadowed; requires faith in Jassy's execution; own for Travel Trust but hard sell.
Lost magical-investing shine; Google's AI crowding into low-code automation space—momentum broken.
All working; drugstore/pharma stocks broadly benefiting from reshuffled competition and regulatory environment.

Streamlined company under new leadership; expect very positive forecast as next medical device player to report.

Document storage down 36%; expected 15% earnings growth at 16x multiples; CEO Levy credibly rebuts AI displacement fears.

Merging with Devon to create fourth-largest independent producer; positioned to supply natural gas to data centers 24/7; investment-grade rated.

Down 43% at 14x (lowest multiple in history including 2008); 12% earnings growth; approaching bottom.
Down 30%; bought some into dip; top security consolidator can't be replicated; rare discount opportunity on high-quality franchise.

Still needs Chinese buyers back; after brutal run, trim holdings rather than buy; cyclical at wrong part of cycle.

CEO Raj Hubberman hero status deserved; extraordinary service improvements while slashing billions in costs—analyst meeting explosive.
Winning AI race on consumer side (Gemini); best-in-class at everything (Google, YouTube, Cloud); $175-185B capex forecast justified.
Acceptable gold exposure but Agnico Eagle (AU) is superior story; gold thesis intact but prefer the better operator.
Aerospace/defense beneficiary of aircraft aging cycle; owned for Charitable Trust alongside Boeing.
Too tightly correlated to Bitcoin; crypto no longer store of value, not a currency, just speculative—toxic repository.
Down 74% from highs; 20% earnings growth at 20x multiples; consider waiting for earnings Wednesday before buying dip.

Distribution margins recovering; crushed estimates on upside surprise; reliable compounder to own on dips.
Beat top and bottom; Zuckerberg explained how AI already improving ad profitability; sold off 5 of 6 days but quarter now free.
